component.name: Claude Session Manager
component.summary: Manage and resume Claude Code sessions

description.p: A native desktop companion for the Claude Code CLI. Browse every Claude Code session on your machine in a sidebar grouped by project, give sessions custom names, star favorites, and resume any of them in embedded terminal tabs.

ul.li: Sessions grouped by project with favorites, search, and live updates
Tabbed embedded terminals resuming sessions in their project directory
Attention indicators when a background session produces output
Session details: message counts, models, token usage
Bulk selection for opening, starring, hiding, or trashing sessions

description.p: Unofficial community tool — not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic. Claude Code's own data is never modified.

ul.li: Set a per-tab emoji prefix from the tab menu
Shift+Enter inserts a newline in Claude's prompt
Clearer active-tab styling and a close-all-tabs button

description.p: Search, graceful close, and sidebar polish.

ul.li: Find bar inside each terminal tab (Ctrl+Shift+G)
Closing a tab asks Claude to exit cleanly (/exit) in the background
Copy session ID from the tab menu
Groups collapsed by default; session rows styled as cards
Renameable tabs and per-tab status dots
Toggleable sidebar with a status footer
Confirmation before closing a tab with a running command
